title: Dogfood Pass 0010 BuildLang Scientific Runtime Receipt Schema

claims.text: Pass 0010 created a BuildScientificRuntimeReceiptSchema/v1 artifact with sixteen required receipt fields and seven verification layers: source, build, runtime, problem, measurement, invariant, and external_verdict.
claims.falsification: schemas/buildlang-scientific-runtime-receipt-schema-pass-0010.json is missing, has the wrong schema id, lacks any required receipt field, or omits any required verification layer

claims.text: Pass 0010 created a BuildScientificRuntimeReceiptSet/v1 artifact with a primary_positive PASS receipt and a negative_fixture FAIL_EXPECTED receipt.
claims.falsification: schemas/buildlang-scientific-runtime-receipts-pass-0010.json is missing, has fewer than two receipts, lacks primary_positive or negative_fixture roles, lacks PASS or FAIL_EXPECTED status, or labels a negative fixture as a normal pass

claims.text: The pass 0010 receipts explicitly preserve source, build, runtime, problem, measurement, invariant, failure-label, and verifier state while labeling the compiler state as ADAPTER_FIXTURE_NOT_BUILDC_EXECUTED.
claims.falsification: any pass 0010 receipt lacks a required substate, lacks failure labels, lacks verifier state, or implies that buildc executed the kernel in this pass

claims.text: The pass 0010 validator reports MATCH with two checks and zero drift.
claims.falsification: schemas/pass-0010-scientific-runtime-validator-result.json is missing, reports non-MATCH status, reports fewer than two matches, or reports drift above zero

claims.text: Pass 0010 defines a concrete buildc adapter target: compile a scientific kernel, emit source/build/runtime/problem/measurement/invariant receipts, preserve expected failures, and export proof-packet-compatible JSON.
claims.falsification: packets/020-buildlang-scientific-runtime-receipts.md does not describe the buildc adapter target or the schema artifact omits the receipt layers needed for that target

claims.text: Pass 0010 promotes zero natural-law discoveries and treats the receipts as schema fixtures rather than scientific discoveries.
claims.falsification: any pass 0010 artifact labels a new physical law, theorem breakthrough, biological result, material result, medical result, finance result, or safety result as promoted
